parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the chorus. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth1: Controls the depth or intensity of the Left delay channel/chorus circuit 1.
parameters-en.Depth2: Controls the depth or intensity of the Center delay channel/chorus circuit 2.
parameters-en.Depth3: Controls the depth or intensity of the Right delay channel/chorus circuit 3.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the chorus effect and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
